pr.title: Phase 14A: Define Mobile & Rapid Capture Architecture Boundaries and Deferred Runtime Gates
pr.body:
Phase 14A establishes Mobile & Rapid Capture boundaries before any offline/runtime-mobile expansion, and keeps scope architecture-only. It consolidates Arc 8–13 workflow/intelligence context, defines explicit separation lines, and documents what must remain deferred until policy and runtime gates are satisfied.

- **Scope framing (Arc 14A architecture-only)**
  - Added `planning/PHASE_14A_MOBILE_RAPID_CAPTURE_ARCHITECTURE_BOUNDARIES.md` as the canonical Phase 14A artifact.
  - Captures hard guardrails: no offline sync/runtime, no push, no native packaging/runtime, no mobile Feed/Inbox runtime, no guardian-facing mobile runtime.

- **Operational baseline + friction inventory**
  - Reviewed and summarized implemented patterns from Arcs 8–13.
  - Mapped current friction in high-frequency operational paths: attendance capture, observation capture, follow-up creation, operational review flow, event workflow, and FieldOps booking flow.

- **Boundary definitions to prevent scope bleed**
  - Explicitly separates:
    - mobile optimization vs offline runtime
    - rapid capture vs Feed/Inbox runtime
    - operational awareness vs messaging/notification systems
    - workflow acceleration vs automation

- **Risk model + deferral controls**
  - Added mobile/capture risk areas:
    - accidental actions
    - incomplete capture
    - auth leakage on mobile surfaces
    - operational ambiguity
    - stale/offline state risk
  - Added a strict **Do Not Implement Yet** section:
    - full offline sync, push notifications, native apps, guardian-facing mobile runtime, mobile Feed/Inbox systems.

- **Forward path definition**
  - Added **Safe First Mobile Slice** recommendation: staff-only mobile web capture acceleration on existing authoritative workflows.
  - Added **Blocking Before Offline/Mobile Runtime** checklist to gate any future offline/mobile-runtime implementation.

- **Planning index update**
  - Updated `planning/README.md` with a new Phase 14A entry and summary for roadmap continuity.

```md
## Do Not Implement Yet

- Full offline sync.
- Push notifications.
- Native mobile apps.
- Guardian-facing mobile runtime.
- Mobile Feed/Inbox systems.
```
pr.author: Copilot
